title: JeremySeq's Trajectory Indicator
description: Shows where your arrow (or any projectile) will land after it is shot.
body:
Displays a hit marker at the predicted landing spot of projectiles for extremely precise aiming. The hit marker turns **red** when a mob will be hit, allowing for **extremely long-distance trick shots**—even when your target is out of sight! Perfect for ender pearl parkour and clutch escapes, ensuring you always land exactly where you intend.

Supports:

- Bows
- Crossbows
- Tridents
- Ender pearls
- Snowballs

![Screenshot of Hitmarker (Zoomed)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aeyO3tw7/images/5479037cf1cd5590f18b22ccd2413d94862755cf.png)
